title: Upcoming monday dev community webinar
excerpt:
Introducing the new monday dev community webinar series - bringing you expert engineering voices to discuss everyday development challenges and tactics to solve them. 
The 1st monday dev community webinar is approaching…

posts.author: eleanor-mondaydev (eleanor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Introducing the new monday dev community webinar series - bringing you expert engineering voices to discuss everyday development challenges and tactics to solve them.

The 1st monday dev community webinar is approaching fast and registration is now open!

Tackling Bottlenecks in Software Development - December 11, at 12 pm EST

In this 30-minute webinar, we’ll discuss:

How to identify delays in the software development process
Why tracking sprint and engineering metrics helps you deliver faster
How to support engineering managers in solving these challenges with monday dev’s new feature set in a live demo

Register here to save your spot.
